content:
Figured i should ask in this server as well. https://rust-lang.zulipchat.com/#narrow/channel/122651-general/topic/Undecipherable.20rustdoc.20error.3F
Basically in the tree I mention there rustdoc is spitting out a totally undecipherable error and I cannot figure out where it's coming from
I have seen that a couple times, when switching Rust toolchain versions. You need to clean the file -- apparently rustdoc expects certain contents there, incompatible with the newer/older version.
That is probably something we should file as a bug tbh
Yeah, I am not sure if it is expected.
Hmm... Perhaps it requires cleaning a few more things -- I recall comparing the files from each version, and thinking that was the culprit, since they were different.
If you remove just Documentation/output/rust, it should work.
What do you mean distclean does not work?

Oh yay that worked
And I assumed make distclean would get rid of all of the generated output. But apparently it just doesn't clean up documentation output at all?
I don't think distclean does -- cleandocs is the one.
Replied in the other Zulip -- let's see if rustdoc is expected or not to handle it.
